methodology_note: Same analytical methodology as loop-01 (no headless rendering engine available): text bounding-box widths are estimated as (0.55 x font-size x char count) + letter-spacing x (char count - 1); vertical extent uses ascent = 0.8 x font-size above baseline and descent = 0.25 x font-size (lowercase-containing text, conservative) or 0.05 x font-size (all-caps/tabular text) below baseline. Rect/line coordinates are exact, taken directly from the SVG source. This loop reuses the identical grid coordinates as loop-01 (same x/y for every shared component) so the two artifacts are directly comparable; only text content, the ink.muted color value, and the new format-badge component differ.

svg_parse.notes: Well-formed XML, single root <svg>, viewBox present, no external href/@import/script references.

overlap_checks.note: both right-aligned near x=930-1120 but occupy disjoint vertical bands (edition-tag y 69.2-82.8, badge y 122-152)
badge text bbox [956.9,130.2,1093.1,143.8] fully inside badge rect [930,122,1120,152] with >=8.2px padding on every side
measured against title-line-1 directly; format-badge sits in the same vertical gap but on a disjoint x-range check above
microcopy occupies bottom-left (x 80-440.8), CTA occupies bottom-right (x 860-1120); horizontally disjoint
cta-text bbox [895.55,522.4,1084.45,541.1] is fully inside cta-button bbox [860,500,1120,564] with >=22px padding on every side
disjoint on both axes: mark is at y 582-588 (below cta-button bottom 564) and x 576-624 (left of cta-button left edge 860)

overlap_summary.note: 3 additional checks vs. loop-01 cover the new format-badge component

clipping_checks.note: right edge at x=1120, matching the shared content right-edge grid line used by header-rule/title-rule/bottom-rule/cta-button
widest text element in this loop, right edge at x=678.4, well inside content right margin (1120) and canvas (1200)
maximum computed text right-edge across all rows is 1093.1 (format-badge-text); minimum left-edge is 80; no bbox exceeds [0,1200] horizontally or [0,630] vertically

contrast_checks.regression_check: loop-01 measured 2.49:1 for this role (fail); loop-02 token value repairs all 5 dependent text nodes to 5.28:1 (pass), a +2.79 improvement.

contrast_checks.note: white text on the new format-badge fill; measured to confirm the new component also clears AA before shipping it.

contrast_summary.improvement_vs_loop_01: ink.muted role improved from 2.49:1 (fail) to 5.28:1 (pass); no other pair regressed.

minimum_font_size_note: All text nodes in this loop, including the new format-badge label, are set at >=16px, matching the loop-01 floor. No regression in minimum type size was introduced while adding the new component.

unreadable_text_check.note: No text is clipped, rotated, or overset. The loop-01 readability defect (ink.muted contrast failure) is resolved: all text nodes, including the new format-badge label, now measure >=4.5:1 against their background.

overall_summary: Loop-02 repairs the single loop-01 defect: the ink.muted token now measures 5.28:1 (was 2.49:1), fixing all five dependent text nodes without any layout regression (all loop-01 geometric checks still pass, plus 3 new checks for the added format-badge component, also passing). The loop additionally proves system extensibility by adding an optional format-badge component and a documented eventVariants section in tokens.json covering both the loop-01 in-person event and this loop's hybrid event on the identical grid. All six objective gates now pass, where loop-01 failed two (readable_text, accessible_contrast).
